prompt:
You are shown the last 1-2 rendered pages (in order) of the region for "Item 1. Business". The next section is "Item 1A. Risk Factors".
Find where Item 1 ends — right before the "Item 1A" heading if it appears, otherwise the very bottom of the last page — and transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 1 before that point. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text: We have previously experienced and may in the future experience manufacturing and production ramp delays for new products and products. For example, we have experienced ramp delays and issues that led to delays during the initial ramp of our first Model 3. We may experience challenges with a supplier or our own ramping efforts that could lead to delays in the production of our products. In addition, we may introduce in the future new manufacturing processes and design features for our products. As we introduce new manufacturing processes, we may encounter issues with our vehicle offerings and global logistics, there is no guarantee that we will be able to successfully and timely introduce and scale these new processes or features.
